title: Security Policy
text: discover security vulnerability package, please report responsibly opening private issue contacting maintainer directly via email clintonmwachia9@gmail.com. reporting, include: clear description vulnerability Steps reproduce issue potential impact can expect initial response within 48–72 hours. Valid vulnerabilities investigated promptly, fixes prioritized based severity. vulnerability accepted, : Work fix soon possible Credit reporter (desired) Release patched version report declined, provide clear explanation. Please avoid disclosing security issues publicly reviewed resolved.
